strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js and React
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching AI agent requirement
Strong testing/TDD background including workshops, Selenium courses, and fluent-asserts library
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin experience; Java mentioned only briefly on older roles
Cloud experience narrow (AWS CDK at Optilyz); no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production depth beyond GISCollective

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: The candidate brings well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with a strong TypeScript/Node.js/React foundation, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP work, and a clear craftsmanship orientation around TDD, testing, and developer tooling. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js exposure and only light Kotlin/Java recency, but the overall profile aligns closely with the role's internal-automation and AI-agent focus.
